renameOnly.proofObligation: Prove alpha-renaming of matched helper functions preserves control flow, storage effects, and ABI-visible behavior.

renameAmbiguous.proofObligation: Prove deterministic rename-family resolution preserves call targets and does not merge semantically distinct helpers.

families.proofObligation: Prove width-specialized checked_add helpers preserve success/revert behavior and resulting values across uint-width normalization.
Prove literal copy helper rewrites preserve byte-for-byte memory contents and allocation boundaries.
Prove address decoder helper rewrites preserve decoded values, revert conditions, and memory cursor movement.
Prove struct encoder helper rewrites preserve emitted ABI layout, offsets, and padding rules.
Prove mappingSlot helper rewrites preserve computed storage keys and scratch-memory usage.
Prove market-parameter hashing rewrites preserve the exact keccak preimage and resulting market id.
